figures.caption: Table 1. Demographic information and behavioral assessment scores. Behavioral assessment was 116 performed using the Quick Aphasia Battery22, Peabody Picture Vocabulary Test23, and Pyramids and 117 Palm Trees–Pictures Test24. P1 had moderate aphasia predominantly affecting word finding and sentence 118 comprehension. P2 had moderate aphasia predominantly affecting grammatical construction and word 119 finding. P3 had severe expressive-receptive aphasia and severe apraxia of speech. Some assessment 120
